summary: Iteration 22: Frontend-only testing of Hub & Spoke sizing logic for DHCP failover topology. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: DHCP Partner dropdown visibility: Shows 'N/A' for GM, GMC roles (3 sites verified)
DHCP Partner dropdown visibility: Shows dropdown for DHCP and DNS/DHCP roles (3 sites verified)
DHCP Partner dropdown functionality: Selecting a Hub marks the site as a Spoke
Hub identification: A site becomes a Hub when other sites point to it as their DHCP Partner
Spoke penalty: Spoke sites have LPS doubled (50% penalty = 2x capacity needed) - verified in calculations.js line 117-119
Hub sizing: Hub sites have additional LPS from aggregated spoke loads - verified in calculations.js line 111-114
Server count: Token count multiplies by server count (tested LA with 2 servers = 6.0K tokens)
Role change clears DHCP Partner: When role changes from DNS/DHCP to DNS, dhcpPartner is cleared - verified in updateSite function line 408-411
Visual indicators: Hub sites show blue indicator (bg-blue-500), Spoke sites show amber indicator (bg-amber-500)
Token calculations: Totals update correctly when Hub/Spoke relationships change (42.5K -> 45.5K with server count change)
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx correctly implements Hub/Spoke UI logic
DHCP Partner dropdown only shows for DHCP/DNS/DHCP roles (line 963: site.role === 'DHCP' || site.role === 'DNS/DHCP')
Hub/Spoke calculations in useMemo (lines 295-341) correctly calculate hubLPSMap and pass isSpoke/hubLPS to getSiteRecommendedModel
calculations.js getSiteRecommendedModel correctly applies 50% LPS penalty for Spokes (line 118: lps * 2) and adds hubLPS for Hubs (line 113)
Visual indicators implemented with conditional row backgrounds (line 839: bg-blue-50/50 for Hub, bg-amber-50/50 for Spoke)
Server count multiplier correctly applied to tokens (line 328-329: adjustedTokens = singleServerTokens * site.serverCount)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 6 sites (3 Data Centers with GM/GMC roles, 3 Locations with DNS/DHCP roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hub & Spoke DHCP failover topology feature verified: 1) DHCP Partner dropdown only shows for DHCP/DNS/DHCP roles (GM/GMC show N/A). 2) Selecting a Hub makes the site a Spoke with amber indicator. 3) The selected site becomes a Hub with blue indicator. 4) Spoke penalty (50% LPS = 2x capacity) applied in calculations.js. 5) Hub sizing adds aggregated Spoke LPS. 6) Server count multiplies tokens. 7) Role change to non-DHCP clears dhcpPartner.

dhcp_partner_dropdown_visibility.dhcp_dns_dhcp_roles: Show dropdown with potential Hub options (3 sites verified)

hub_spoke_relationship.hub_identification: Site becomes Hub when other sites point to it as dhcpPartner
hub_spoke_relationship.spoke_identification: Site becomes Spoke when it has a dhcpPartner selected

hub_sizing.implementation: Hub LPS = base LPS + aggregated Spoke LPS

role_change_clears_dhcp_partner.implementation: updateSite clears dhcpPartner when role changes to non-DHCP

visual_indicators.hub_indicator: Blue dot (bg-blue-500) and 'Hub' text in DHCP Partner column
visual_indicators.spoke_indicator: Amber dot (bg-amber-500) and Hub name in amber in DHCP Partner column
visual_indicators.row_backgrounds: Hub rows: bg-blue-50/50, Spoke rows: bg-amber-50/50

token_calculations.implementation: Totals update correctly when Hub/Spoke relationships change
token_calculations.verified_values: 42.5K base, 45.5K with server count=2 for LA
